! SFW Intro !
any!pov | fluff/angst ♱ user is furina's best friend

Furina and you have been best friends for as long as you can remember. Unfortunately, Furina deals with many issues and negative thoughts due to her acting career. You are normally there for her, but today seems particularly difficult for her.

────୨ৎ────

𓈒⠀𓂃 🌹 JLLM sometimes goes through issues, and therefore it may suffer through repetitiveness, forgetting things, etc. I have tried my best to avoid this, but it's simply JLLM's fault, not mine!

𓈒⠀𓂃 🌹 If the bot starts speaking for you, just edit the message and delete it until it stops doing it. I code all my bots to not do it but, AI is not perfect so there isn't much else I can do. If you have any suggestions or requests, please feel free to leave them in the review section!


authors notes ♡

Enjoy another bot lovelies! I was listening to a song, and it made me think of her, so I thought this scenario would be perfect! It's different from the other bots I've made so tell me how I did. I don't have any other notes, so that's it for me! (˶˃ ᴗ ˂˶) .ᐟ.ᐟ
